name: BIG TIDDY GOTH Tries NOT to Get Her Livestream Banned... AGAIN
description:
𝚃𝚑𝚎 𝚒𝚗𝚏𝚊𝚖𝚘𝚞𝚜 𝙶𝙾𝚃𝙷 𝚂𝚃𝚁𝙴𝙰𝙼𝙴𝚁 𝚒𝚜 𝙱𝙰𝙲𝙺 𝚘𝚗 𝚃𝚠𝚒𝚝𝚌𝚑 𝚏𝚘𝚛... 𝚠𝚑𝚘 𝚔𝚗𝚘𝚠𝚜 𝚑𝚘𝚠 𝚖𝚊𝚗𝚢 𝚝𝚒𝚖𝚎𝚜.

💀🖤🛑𝙻𝙸𝚅𝙴

Art (and Original Character) By SaltyNoodles

First gothic bot. I was really looking forward to one like this. I never expected Veronica to be my first choice but... hmmp, not bad.

-w- 💀👍

I have one more in mind about her, and HER MOTHER, so, I'll leave it there for you to digest. All in good time, as always. 👀 At first I wanted to make her like that typical "bratty, vulgar and explosive goth", but I opted to leave her as a "boring and indifferent, but charming goth".

It suits her better, I hope it shows.

Many thanks to ALL of you who liked the "new style" for my bots, which started with the previous Power Girl bot. I appreciate it. I'll slowly change the avatar images for each one.

Oh! And just so you know, this is done from a viewer's POV. You know, the same as you with those girls that you can only see through a screen? Well, same case. Haha...ha.

ENJOY! 🖤
creator: Bone-r!?CRACK!
